textByHashes.862316c458b70c1e58b095394824bbeaf0b45fe3: Welcome to the Burthorpe Games Rooms!
textByHashes.b9d6edc879ca8d779516220dd5e273b63bb13059: You can challenge someone to a game anywhere in the games rooms by using the right click option. Choose the type of game and then choose the options you want such as time per move. If you want to play a particular
textByHashes.0565d20a5ed8d15256b2f92dad775896e85666d4: game there are challenge rooms dedicated to that game. In the challenge rooms you can see other players ranks by right clicking them, their skill will be displayed instead of their combat level. Once you have enough
textByHashes.3ed3dfefcd42edea0f86a4cc69671a98b1816bba: experience you will be able to use the challenge rooms on the first floor! If your opponent accepts the challenge you will be taken to one of the tables in the main room where you will play your game of choice.
textByHashes.eb12097d5d66e8b486446745632ac8ff3a17ef88: Once you have finished your game you will go back to the challenge room where you can challenge again!
textByHashes.d8afb38bf56d0d00cc6e0a699291674834f50eaf: Currently we offer Draughts, Runelink, Runesquares, and Runeversi.
textByHashes.5e5cc793e3d7bf466096aef0cd1bcf51c102e386: Draughts uses standard rules, apart from: a draw is declared if no piece has been taken or promoted for forty moves. To play Draughts go to the challenge room in the SW corner.
textByHashes.dd737671555a0e64eec8b388389b76e4238f1d6a: Yup, you have to get four runes in row. The challenge room for Runelink is in the SE corner.
textByHashes.9af7b17d79dad384f707cef1e6d9906416902368: Yes, you take it in turns to add a line with the goal of making squares. Everytime you make a square you take another turn. The challenge room for Runesquares is in the SW corner.
textByHashes.cad6832da9f0dc75d0073f0d2aa208cc22168986: Yep, the aim is to have more of your runes on the board than your opponent. You can take your opponents pieces by trapping them between your own. The challenge room for Runeversi is in the SE corner.
textByHashes.b4ca48e34c39bf772dfeec529617006647c47792: Certainly miss, our speciality is Asgarnian Ale, we also serve Wizard's Mind Bomb and Dwarven Stout.
textByHashes.a9d74092658630e7756901d5db0d76474bdcd292: Hello there, are you interested in buying one of my special capes?
textByHashes.08be493625725984b1adf6f8c157ca967e57a5cd: Ahh well they make it less likely that you'll accidently attack anyone wearing the same cape as you and easier to attack everyone else. They also make it easier to distinguish people who're wearing the same cape as you
textByHashes.a40c1aca8cacc9931a665f874e1045d06509992d: from everyone else. They're very useful when out in the wilderness with friends or anyone else you don't want to harm.
textByHashes.123cfbd0bc01ad253a4811850a9ca0691b590048: So would you like to buy one?
textByHashes.c14904b26ecfb29073aa8124df0798b80d490fe7: Can you help me find a book I want? That snotty Arceuus Librarian won't even say hello, never mind actually helping me.
textByHashes.ddb1db87688f7f4e33d49104879098af12a1bdaf: I think I'd like to read: ''
textByHashes.8ceaeb86f8b0d99f10a0dbe61e3a27daa361206d: I'm about to join the crew of a cargo ship, trading goods with the eastern lands. I hear our voyages can last for weeks, especially if the winds are slack.
textByHashes.711537217df3da2c4d192dbc72bc51a32127e705: I don't want to run out of stuff to talk about with the other sailors, so I'm doing plenty of background reading before we sail. Will you find my book, please?
textByHashes.7b1f1cb44dbc56baa2a926514a20f03fdcf3b92a: Have you found my book yet? ''
textByHashes.f6d45f627dc8ca302cb64da35e84329fed4b5513: It's just typical of the Arceuus snobs that their Librarian's too good to help customers like me. They ought to be grateful to you for doing her job for her.
textByHashes.047866f8c001494bc35ebf1606c7898046c11202: I'll grab you later when you're not busy helping someone else.
textByHashes.39417a5404bbae01e11ec5a92ba009bd8d9a8171: Thanks, I'll get on with reading it. Meanwhile, you can have this other book of mine - I won't be wanting to read it again.
textByHashes.1dd022b5a27a417564f3e02b4c3749298930b05c: Thanks for finding the book. I'll have to think up what I need next.
